hypothesis: All 5 v01 trades (RSI 27.9-29.8) stopped out in a downtrend. RSI<30 entries fire too early in falling markets. Lowering threshold to 25 requires deeper oversold confirmation, expected to reduce false entries and improve win rate.

position_size_r 0.5 risks 100 USDT per trade (10% of total capital) — too aggressive for an unproven strategy. Reducing to 0.05 caps each trade at 10 USDT (1% of capital), keeping max loss per trade under $0.20 at current stop_loss_pct. Preserves capital for the strategy to learn across many more trades.

variable_changed: multiple — operator upgrade (futures + trend filter + shorts)
rationale: Binance Futures enables both long and short. Trend filter prevents longs in downtrends and shorts in uptrends — stops catching falling knives.

changes: Added volatility regime engine (calm/normal/volatile/extreme) — dynamically adjusts capital, position size, stop loss, max pairs
Added pair scanner — selects top N from 10-pair universe based on liquidity, signal strength, trend clarity, volatility fit
Added multi-timeframe confluence (4H MACD, 4H trend, 1H RSI divergence, 1H MACD crossover)
Added candle data adapter (Binance public OHLCV, 3 timeframes, cached)
Added pure indicators module (RSI, MACD, SMA, ATR, realized vol, RSI divergence)
Coordinator re-scans universe every 30 min, retires/activates pairs dynamically
rationale: Full signal stack: volatility-aware capital allocation + dynamic pair selection + multi-timeframe reversal confirmation + MACD conviction filter.

changes: Added liquidity grab detector (15m wick sweep of swing low/high, wick≥2×body)
Liquidity grab overrides trend filter — confirmed stop-hunt = high conviction entry
Added per-pair drawdown cap (10% of pair capital → pause pair)
Added portfolio drawdown cap (8% of total → halt all entries)
PnL now tracked in USDT terms alongside % in trade log

hypothesis: Adding ADX-based sideways detection + range-entry logic will capture mean-reversion trades when the market is consolidating. When BTC 1H ADX < 20, skip RSI/trend filter and instead enter long at the bottom 20% of PDH-PDL range, short at the top 20%. Use swing high/low to tighten the range if they sit inside the prior-day extremes. MTF MACD still required as entry filter.
expected: More trades in ranging markets; improved fill-rate during sideways consolidation periods
